headline: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) Slides After Q1 2026 Earnings Miss Estimates
summary: Equity Residential (EQR) shares fell after Q1 2026 earnings missed revenue estimates, though normalized FFO beat expectations. Strong core market performance and record low turnover highlight operational strength despite cautious guidance.

headline: 4 'Safer' Dividend Buys Out Of Barron's 23 April Better Bets Than T-Bills
summary: Long-term bond yields persist under pressure. But investors looking for income can still find plenty of attractive opportunities with dividend-paying stocks that have healthy yields.
